module: three.js visual engine (three-scene, three-lyrics, particles, shelf)

nodes.label: three-scene.js
nodes.description: Three.js scene setup, camera system (orbit/free/beat-synced), renderer, cinema dynamics, realtime beat engine, performance adaptation

nodes.label: scene
nodes.description: THREE.Scene instance (background null for alpha)

nodes.label: camera
nodes.description: THREE.PerspectiveCamera (FOV 45)

nodes.label: renderer
nodes.description: THREE.WebGLRenderer with alpha, high-performance, dynamic pixel ratio

nodes.label: orbit object
nodes.description: Orbital camera controller: userTheta/Phi/Radius, cineOffset, focus target, glow follow, beat glow

nodes.label: freeCamera state
nodes.description: Free camera mode (WASD + mouse) with position/yaw/pitch/roll/fov, pointer lock, reset tween

nodes.label: beatCam object
nodes.description: Beat-synced camera state: nextIdx, events[], punch, theta/phi/radius/roll kicks, stats

nodes.label: uniforms (global)
nodes.description: Shared Three.js uniforms object (declared in particles.js, referenced globally)

nodes.label: cinemaDynamics
nodes.description: Running average/peak/scale for audio-reactive cinema camera movement

nodes.label: cinemaTrackProfile
nodes.description: Per-track profile: scale, energy/low/vocal averages, punch peak, density

nodes.label: resetBeatCameraSync(t)
nodes.description: Resets beat camera sync state to time t

nodes.label: processRealtimeBeatEngine(dt)
nodes.description: Real-time FFT beat detection: sub/low/body/vocal/snap bands, onset detection, tempo tracking, hit detection with rhythm acceptance

nodes.label: scheduleBeatCamera(beat, source)
nodes.description: Schedules camera movement from a beat event with strength/tone/combo-based amplitude

nodes.label: updateCinemaDynamics(rawEnergy, rawLow)
nodes.description: Updates cinema dynamics scale from energy/low inputs

nodes.label: applyFreeCameraToCamera()
nodes.description: Applies free camera position/rotation/shake to camera object

nodes.label: updateFreeCamera(dt)
nodes.description: Updates free camera position from WASD input, velocity, and reset tween

nodes.label: rtBeat object
nodes.description: Realtime beat engine state: band follow values, onset avg/peak, tempo tracking, hit stats

nodes.label: three-lyrics.js
nodes.description: 3D lyrics rendering system: canvas-textured text planes, star river particles, lyric layout save/load, color/font management, color lab

nodes.label: stageLyrics object
nodes.description: Stage lyrics state: group, current/outgoing meshes, palette, starRiver, lock fit scale

nodes.label: readSavedLyricLayout()
nodes.description: Reads all visual preset/fx parameters from localStorage, returns normalized configuration object

nodes.label: saveLyricLayout()
nodes.description: Saves all visual preset/fx parameters to localStorage

nodes.label: normalizeHexColor(value, fallback)
nodes.description: Normalizes hex color string (#xxx -> #xxxxxx, validates)

nodes.label: normalizeCoverResolution(v)
nodes.description: Clamps cover resolution value (0.75-1.55)

nodes.label: createLyricsParticles()
nodes.description: Creates stage lyrics 3D group and star river particle system

nodes.label: ensureLyricStarRiver()
nodes.description: Creates star river (420-point flowing particle stream below lyrics) with ShaderMaterial

nodes.label: updateLyricStarRiver(dt)
nodes.description: Updates star river size, opacity, position based on current lyrics and fx parameters

nodes.label: clearStageLyrics()
nodes.description: Clears all lyrics meshes from stage

nodes.label: lyricFontStackForKey(key)
nodes.description: Returns CSS font-family stack for given font key (sans/hei/song/bold-song/stone-song/etc)

nodes.label: updateStageLyrics3D()
nodes.description: Main 3D lyrics update loop (called from animation frame, referenced from index.html)

nodes.label: particles.js
nodes.description: Main particle system: geometry, dot texture, cover texture, uniforms, vertex/fragment shaders, ripple system

nodes.label: dotTexture
nodes.description: Radial gradient dot canvas texture for particles

nodes.label: geo (particle geometry)
nodes.description: BufferGeometry with position/aUv/aRand attributes for cover particle grid

nodes.label: coverTex
nodes.description: THREE.Texture for cover image, updated on track change

nodes.label: prevCoverTex
nodes.description: Previous cover texture for crossfade transition

nodes.label: coverEdgeTex
nodes.description: Edge/depth texture (R=depth, G=edge, B=fg-mask, A=lum)

nodes.label: uniforms (detailed)
nodes.description: Complete uniforms for particle shaders: uTime, uBass, uMid, uTreble, uBeat, uEnergy, uBurstAmt, uVinylSpin, uPreset, all FX parameters, mouse interaction, ripple, cover textures

nodes.label: buildCoverParticleGeometry(grid)
nodes.description: Builds BufferGeometry from grid count with position (PLANE_SIZE) and UV coordinates

nodes.label: applyCoverParticleResolution(value, opts)
nodes.description: Changes particle grid resolution, rebuilds geometry, triggers cover reload

nodes.label: rippleData/rippleTex/ripples
nodes.description: Ripple effect system: DataTexture (1xN) with x/y/age/str, array of ripple trackers

nodes.label: floatGroup
nodes.description: Float particle layer group (declared in index.html, managed by particles.js)

nodes.label: shelf.js
nodes.description: 3D shelf system: side/stage modes, card rendering, hover cue, layout profiles, pinned open state

nodes.label: shelfManager
nodes.description: Global shelf manager instance (created by makeShelfManager)

nodes.label: makeShelfManager()
nodes.description: Factory function creating shelf manager with methods: getMode, buildOneCard, currentItems, clearSelected, closeContent, etc.

nodes.label: safeShelfRebuild(reason, loadCover)
nodes.description: Safely rebuilds shelf cards with error handling

nodes.label: scheduleShelfRebuild(reason, loadCover)
nodes.description: Schedules a deferred shelf rebuild using requestAnimationFrame

nodes.label: currentItems
nodes.description: Array of current items displayed in the shelf

nodes.label: buildOneCard(song, index)
nodes.description: Creates a single Three.js shelf card mesh (cover plane, glow ring, text sprite) for a song

nodes.label: shelfSettings()
nodes.description: Returns normalized shelf position/size/opacity parameters from fx state

nodes.label: shelfLayoutProfile()
nodes.description: Returns shelf layout parameters (position, scale, rotation) for side/stage modes

nodes.label: setShelfPinnedOpen(open, immediate)
nodes.description: Pins shelf open/closed, manages focus zone and home visibility

nodes.label: compactCount(n)
nodes.description: Formats large numbers (10000->1万, 100000000->1亿)
